title: Two arrested after road accident in Delhi
fullText: The Delhi Police on Tuesday arrested two individuals in connection with the death of a 30-year-old man in a road accident near the Uttam Nagar West metro station, an official said.The victim, identified as Daksh Sawaria, was riding his scooty when he collided with the open door of a taxi and was subsequently run over by a DTC bus. “The police rushed to the scene and took the victim to Deen Dayal Upadhyay Hospital, where doctors declared him brought dead. The taxi driver and the bus driver have been arrested,” the official said. Published - March 04, 2026 01:01 am IST
